body:
Addressed codex review threads for PR #11 in commit `9f65ec5`.

Thread `PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5x_AdW` (inventory nonzero masking):
- Change: `runInventoryStage` now hard-stops on nonzero `gh pr list` exit with `HARD_STOP_GH_INVENTORY_FAILED`.
- File: `src/s07/open_pr_protocol.ts`.
- Verification: `node --test --experimental-transform-types src/s07/open_pr_protocol.test.ts` includes `inventory command failure triggers HARD_STOP_GH_INVENTORY_FAILED` (PASS).

Thread `PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5x_AdZ` (thread query nonzero masking):
- Change: `queryThreads` now returns receipt + payload; readiness/codex stages hard-stop on nonzero GraphQL exit using `HARD_STOP_GH_THREADS_QUERY_FAILED`.
- File: `src/s07/open_pr_protocol.ts`.
- Verification: test `thread query failure triggers HARD_STOP_GH_THREADS_QUERY_FAILED` (PASS).

Thread `PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5x_Adb` (ahead/behind probe nonzero masking):
- Change: canonical preflight now hard-stops if `pre_ahead_behind` exit is nonzero (cannot prove sync state).
- File: `src/s07/open_pr_protocol.ts`.
- Verification: test `ahead-behind probe failure hard-stops primary sync preflight` (PASS).

Gates after fix:
- `npm run -s verify` PASS
- `bash gates.sh` PASS

Evidence:
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/07_gates_verify_final2.txt`
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/07_gates_gates_sh_final2.txt`
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/at/AT-S07-01.tap`
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/at/AT-S07-02.tap`
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/at/AT-S07-03.tap`
